title: MoreDurability (More Durability)
description: MoreDurability is a lightweight mod that multiplies the durability of your tools and armor — so they last longer and never break unexpectedly.
body:
## More Durability

Instead of your tools, weapons, shields, or armor wearing out and breaking faster than you'd expect, More Durability:

**Multiplies Max Durability**
- Configure independent multipliers for Armor, Tools, Ranged Weapons, Shields, Tridents and more in `config/moredurability.json`
- Gear now has 2x, 3x, or more lifespan before ever reaching zero durability

**Zero Break Surprises**
- No more "one-tick" breaks or disappearing items
- Items only break when they genuinely hit zero durability

Perfect for RPG servers, hardcore survival, or any adventure where every piece of gear matters.

Works in Singleplayer and Multiplayer.

Used in the [Legends Reborn: Medieval](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/legends-reborn-medieval) modpack.
